{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = scythe (Cradle)
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A door at the end of the compound is marked with the image of a scythe.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
